== Notes for [[Item:Q114731|Q114731]] ==

http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/GASCONY.htm

*1. [ADALRIC . The name of Adalric's wife is not known. Adalric & his wife had [two] children:] ...
**a) [JIMENO (-after [814/15]). m ---. The name of Jimeno's wife is not known. Jimeno & his wife had one child:]
**b) [CENTULE (-[812]). The name of Centule's wife is not known. Centule & his wife had [two] children:]

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
